description_long: This rifle features a robust, boxy receiver with a matte dark finish and angular contours, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The stock is a skeletonized design, providing structural support while minimizing weight, and is colored in a muted green. A large, rectangular magazine is attached beneath the receiver, suggesting high capacity and rapid reload capability. The barrel is short and thick, protruding slightly from the main body, and is capped with a simple muzzle. On top, a raised iron sight is present, aiding in target acquisition. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, suitable for rugged urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy rifle with a skeletonized green stock, large rectangular magazine, short barrel, and raised iron sight. The finish is matte and utilitarian, with a mix of metal and polymer parts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletonized green stock, and large rectangular magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short, thick barrel, raised iron sight, and the width of the magazine and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock structure and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock, rear sight alignment, and the back of the receiver.
